articles.title: Lightning beat the Bruins 3-1 hours after securing a playoff spot
articles.description:
Jeremy Swayman stopped 20 shots as Boston lost its second straight on a four-game trip.

The post Lightning beat the Bruins 3-1 hours after securing a playoff spot appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins lost 3-1 to Lightning on April 4 during a four-game trip.
Jeremy Swayman saved 20 shots, marking the Bruins' second consecutive loss.
Boston residents see Bruins struggling as playoffs approach, raising concerns for team performance.
